params.name: The Graces
params.description:
On Jul 7, 1640 AD, Rubens completed this famous oil painting on a wood panel.
"The Three Graces" is a remarkable late masterpiece by renowned German painter Rubens. Departing from traditional aesthetics, he depicted the three youthful goddesses from Greek mythology with a unique interpretation. The goddesses in the painting possess a plump and slightly bloated appearance, set against a backdrop of vivid and vibrant colors. This portrayal not only reflects a strong sense of secularism but also …
